_provenance.notes: Single homepage capture per uplift opinionated default. Palette/type aggregated from one page; cross-page bias not applicable to single-page uplift.

logo.source: inline SVG wordmark + script Paramount lockup
logo.note: Hero uses a script 'Paramount' wordmark with 'A SKYDANCE CORPORATION' lockup over an electric-blue 'WE ARE' display headline.

roles.name: Midnight Navy
roles.usage: Dominant page background and primary text color. The brand's anchor.

roles.name: Electric Blue
roles.usage: Section backgrounds ('MORE OF WHAT YOU LOVE'), giant display type ('WE ARE', 'FUTURE'), links and accents.

roles.name: Paper White
roles.usage: Body background, reversed text on navy/blue, tile gaps.

roles.name: Magenta Pop
roles.usage: Rare hover/accent highlight. Used sparingly (<2% of surfaces).

scaleAudit.note: Display sizes are very large and editorial (112-160px) with tight line-heights; body is a flat 18px. Big jump display->body, no intermediate modular steps observed on home.

radii.note: Only round (circle) radii observed — logo mark, icon buttons. Tiles and sections are hard-cornered (0px).

motifs.dominantRadius: 0px (hard rectangular tiles); 50% only for circular marks
motifs.shadowStrategy: Flat. No box-shadows observed — depth comes from flat color blocking (navy vs electric-blue vs white), not elevation.
commonPatterns: oversized editorial display headline behind/over imagery
carousel (slick slider on hero IP images)

voice.heroHeadline: WE ARE / Paramount — MORE OF What you love
voice.firstBodyParagraph: Paramount+, part of Paramount's global portfolio of multimedia entertainment and news brands, is a direct-to-consumer digital subscription video on-demand and live streaming service.
voice.tone: Bold, confident, celebratory, pop-culture-forward. Big single-idea statements ('WE ARE', 'WHAT YOU LOVE', 'SHAPE THE FUTURE'). Corporate-but-playful — a media holding company that fronts its consumer IP (SpongeBob, Star Trek, RuPaul, NCIS).

carousel.evidence: 'slick' font-family loaded; hero IP images rotate via slick slider
carousel.behavior: auto-rotating hero IP imagery (SpongeBob, Zoe, NCIS, RuPaul, Star Trek) behind the script Paramount wordmark

motion.signature: Auto-rotating hero IP carousel + giant kinetic display type. No background video; motion is slider-driven imagery and (implied) reveal transitions.

header.treatment: Minimal transparent nav over navy hero; circular logo mark top-left, hamburger top-right.

footer.treatment: Navy footer with column link lists, brand logos (Pluto TV etc.), legal row.

ctaBand.evidence: 'SHAPE THE FUTURE' careers band with 'JOIN US' CTA and a portrait of an employee.

sections.label: MORE OF WHAT YOU LOVE (12-tile brand grid)
